title: INSERT INTO a MERGE TABLE crashes mserver5
poc: alter table m add table t1;
alter table m add table t2;
key_bug_features: INSERT INTO a MERGE TABLE causes crash
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE m (id int PRIMARY KEY, name varchar(50));
CREATE TABLE t1 (i int, j float);
CREATE TABLE t2 (i int, k date);
ALTER TABLE m ADD TABLE t1;
ALTER TABLE m ADD TABLE t2;
